---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Describe the situation where the current behavior falls short.

Example: "When an agent sends 50 calls in 10 seconds, there is no way to distinguish between a legitimate burst and a runaway loop because..."

## Proposed Solution

What would you like to see? Be as specific as you can. If you have a design in mind, include it here: API shape, config options, CLI output, etc.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you think about, and why did you rule them out?

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, prior art in other tools, or any other context that helps frame the request.
